character_ko: An elderly Korean man in his 70s. He wears a worn undershirt covered by a neatly ironed old delivery uniform vest. His face is etched with deep wrinkles, reflecting a life of hardship and grief. His eyes are filled with sorrow, and his hair is likely thin and graying. He appears frail but meticulously neat in his attire.
character_en: Elderly Korean man in delivery uniform vest, sorrowful expression, wrinkled face.
background_ko: 낡은 연립주택의 좁고 어두운 거실. 오후 5시, 해가 지기 시작하는 시간대의 흐릿한 빛이 창문을 통해 스며든다. 낡은 식탁 위에는 짜장면 두 그릇과 단무지 접시, 젓가락 두 벌이 놓여 있다. 전체적으로 어둡고 차가운 색감.
background_en: The cramped, dimly lit living room of an old Korean apartment. It's 5 PM, and the fading light filters through the windows. On the worn-out dining table are two bowls of Jajangmyeon (black bean noodles), a small dish of Danmuji (yellow pickled radish), and two sets of chopsticks. The overall color scheme is dark and cold. Focus on hyperrealistic details.
art_style_override_ko: 극사실적인 묘사를 기반으로, 한국 드라마 영화의 어둡고 절제된 분위기를 유지한다. 인물의 감정선을 섬세하게 표현하며, 배경의 디테일을 살려 현실감을 더한다.
art_style_override_en: Maintain a dark and restrained atmosphere reminiscent of Korean drama films, based on hyperrealistic depiction. Express the characters' emotional nuances delicately and enhance realism by emphasizing background details. Cinematic lighting, 35mm lens.
visual_variety_ko: [대립과 긴장] 캐릭터 간의 감정 선과 갈등을 강조하는 연출: 표정의 대비, 그림자 활용, 긴박한 구도 위주.
visual_variety_en: Conflict and Tension: Emphasize emotional tension between characters. Use dramatic lighting, sharp contrasts, and tight framing on facial expressions.
